use_cases: Display order or transaction status such as pending, success, or failed states
Show workflow progress indicators for review or in-progress processes
Indicate build or deployment status in CI/CD pipelines
Represent task completion states in project management tools
Display user account or subscription status in SaaS applications
ai_summary: A clean, flat-style status badge component that displays various workflow states including pending, success, failed, in-progress, and in-review. Uses subtle background tints with matching iconography and text colors for clear visual hierarchy. Designed as an atomic component suitable for integration into dashboards, forms, or data tables across SaaS, e-commerce, and developer tooling platforms.
